name: Safety triage: route on the caller's first reply
notes: Pins the conversation at the opening (the agent has just asked 'is everyone okay / are you safe'). Each branch is a different first reply; we check that injuries/unsafe-scene replies get a 911 prompt (-> flow_defer_emergency) while safe replies move to identification (-> flow_identify) with no 911. Maps to flow_safety_triage.exit_paths.

branches.user_input: Everyone's fine and I'm pulled over safely off the road.
My passenger's leg is broken and there's a lot of blood.
branches.notes: injury_severity serious -> xp_st_to_defer; never ask for a policy number first.

branches.user_input: I'm dizzy and I'm still sitting in the middle of the road.
Everyone's okay, just a little shaken up.
branches.notes: okay + implicitly safe -> proceed to intake.
